title: Sudden Silence
prompt: Describe a moment when the air suddenly became silent and how it made you feel.
hint: Think about the emotions triggered by unexpected silence.
sample: I felt uneasy and anxious when the room suddenly fell silent.
ja: {'prompt': '描述空气突然安静的时刻，以及你的感受。', 'hint': '想想突如其来的安静带来的情绪。', 'sample': '当房间突然安静时，我感到不安和焦虑。', 'local_lang': 'zh', 'local_label': '中文'}
local: {'prompt': '描述空气突然安静的时刻，以及你的感受。', 'hint': '想想突如其来的安静带来的情绪。', 'sample': '当房间突然安静时，我感到不安和焦虑。', 'local_lang': 'zh', 'local_label': '中文'}

title: Sudden Concern from Friends
prompt: Write about a time when a friend's sudden concern surprised you and how you reacted.
hint: Consider how unexpected care from friends can affect your feelings.
sample: I was touched and a bit embarrassed when my friend suddenly asked if I was okay.
ja: {'prompt': '写一写朋友突然关心你的时候，以及你的反应。', 'hint': '考虑朋友意外关心对你的影响。', 'sample': '当朋友突然问我是否安好时，我感到感动又有些害羞。', 'local_lang': 'zh', 'local_label': '中文'}

title: Sudden Memories
prompt: Recall a sudden memory that came to your mind and describe its impact on you.
hint: Think about how unexpected memories can affect your mood.
sample: A sudden memory of childhood made me smile and feel nostalgic.
ja: {'prompt': '回忆突然浮现时，描述它对你的影响。', 'hint': '想想突如其来的回忆如何影响你的心情。', 'sample': '童年的回忆突然浮现，让我微笑并感到怀念。', 'local_lang': 'zh', 'local_label': '中文'}
local: {'prompt': '回忆突然浮现时，描述它对你的影响。', 'hint': '想想突如其来的回忆如何影响你的心情。', 'sample': '童年的回忆突然浮现，让我微笑并感到怀念。', 'local_lang': 'zh', 'local_label': '中文'}

title: Missing Someone Suddenly
prompt: Express your feelings when you suddenly miss someone and wonder where they are.
hint: Describe the emotions and thoughts that come with sudden longing.
sample: Suddenly, I missed you and wondered where you might be.
ja: {'prompt': '突然想念某人时，表达你的感受和想法。', 'hint': '描述突如其来的思念带来的情绪和想法。', 'sample': '突然好想你，想知道你在哪里。', 'local_lang': 'zh', 'local_label': '中文'}

title: Memories Like Beautiful Songs
prompt: Compare your memories to a beautiful song and describe how they changed over time.
hint: Think about how happy memories can turn into sad ones.
sample: Our memories were like a beautiful song but became two sad movies.
ja: {'prompt': '将你的回忆比作一首美丽的歌曲，并描述它们如何变化。', 'hint': '想想快乐的回忆如何变成悲伤。', 'sample': '我们的回忆像一首美丽的歌曲，后来变成了两部悲伤的电影。', 'local_lang': 'zh', 'local_label': '中文'}
